inputs.label: Principal Amount
inputs.businessContext: The initial sum of money invested or borrowed.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial sum of money invested or borrowed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırılan veya borç alınan başlangıç para miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der anfänglich investierte oder geliehene Geldbetrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme d'argent initiale investie ou empruntée.
businessContext_i18n.es: La suma inicial de dinero invertida o prestada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ الأولي من الأموال المستثمرة أو المقترضة.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: The nominal annual interest rate before compounding.

businessContext_i18n.en: The nominal annual interest rate before compounding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşik faiz öncesi nominal yıllık faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der nominale jährliche Zinssatz vor Zinseszins.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt annuel nominal avant capitalisation.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de interés anual nominal antes de la capitalización.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الفائدة السنوي الاسمي قبل المركبة.

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: The total time the money is invested or borrowed for.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total time the money is invested or borrowed for.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paranın yatırıldığı veya borç alındığı toplam süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gesamte Zeitdauer der Geldanlage oder -leihe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale pendant laquelle l'argent est investi ou emprunté.
businessContext_i18n.es: El tiempo total durante el cual el dinero está invertido o prestado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت الإجمالي الذي يتم فيه استثمار الأموال أو اقتراضها.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: The number of compounding periods per year. For quarterly, this is 4.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of compounding periods per year. For quarterly, this is 4.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik dönem sayısı. Üç aylık için bu 4'tür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Zinseszinsperioden pro Jahr. Bei vierteljährlicher Verzinsung ist dies 4.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de périodes de capitalisation par an. Pour un trimestre, c'est 4.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de períodos de capitalización por año. Para trimestral, esto es 4.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد فترات المركبة في السنة. للربع سنوي، هذا الرقم هو 4.

inputs.label: Annual Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: The expected average annual inflation rate, used to calculate the real value of money.

businessContext_i18n.en: The expected average annual inflation rate, used to calculate the real value of money.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beklenen ortalama yıllık enflasyon oranı, paranın reel değerini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die erwartete durchschnittliche jährliche Inflationsrate, zur Berechnung des realen Geldwerts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel moyen attendu, utilisé pour calculer la valeur réelle de l'argent.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de inflación anual promedio esperada, utilizada para calcular el valor real del dinero.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط معدل التضخم السنوي المتوقع، يستخدم لحساب القيمة الحقيقية للنقود.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
